boilerplate: BuildKit MTG Meta Hub is unofficial Fan Content permitted under the Wizards of the Coast Fan Content Policy. Not approved/endorsed by Wizards. Portions of the materials used are property of Wizards of the Coast. (c) Wizards of the Coast LLC.

banlist.methodology: Snapshot of Scryfall's machine-readable legalities (the ban truth) as of this bulk-data pull. Scryfall's legality statuses are legal/not_legal/restricted/banned — there is no separate 'suspended' status, so Vintage-style restricted cards are reported alongside banned rather than inventing a status Scryfall doesn't expose. See the linked Wizards announcement page for the human explanation and change history; Scryfall doesn't carry ban dates, so this row does not claim a 'last B&R change' date it can't ground.

banned: Ajani, Nacatl Pariah // Ajani, Nacatl Avenger
Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student // Tamiyo, Seasoned Scholar

calendar.methodology: Recent real (non-digital) expansion/core/commander/masters sets from Scryfall's /sets endpoint, newest first — near-zero maintenance per METAHUB-SPEC.md module 4. 'standard_legal' is read directly off whether Scryfall reports ANY card from that set as Standard-legal (ground truth, not a hand-maintained rotation calendar).

commander_tiers.methodology: Deck-frequency tiers computed by us from the Archidekt public decklist corpus: 'trending' = newest decks (orderBy=-createdAt), 'established' = most-viewed decks (orderBy=-viewCount). Tier is the commander's deck-count rank-percentile within its bucket (S>=90th, A>=70th, B>=40th, C>=15th, else D). This measures popularity + momentum, NOT a constructed win rate — we don't have proprietary tracker telemetry for that (see METAHUB-SPEC.md's honesty rails). top_inclusions = the non-land cards most often played alongside that commander across the decks we scanned. Tournament-result axis (topdeck.gg): pending_key.

top_inclusions: Invasion of Ikoria // Zilortha, Apex of Ikoria

limited_tiers.methodology: Real win rates from 17lands' public PremierDraft card ratings (CC BY 4.0) for the current premier set. Tier = ever-drawn win rate vs the field (S>=56%, A>=53%, B>=50.5%, C>=48%, else D); sample_size = game_count. Cards with no recorded games render 'unrated', never a guessed tier.
attribution: Win rates via 17lands.com public card ratings (CC BY 4.0)

formats.methodology: One hub-card row per tracked format: legal-set list + banned/restricted counts from Scryfall legalities (ground truth), our own coverage state for this hub (honest 'pending' where a module isn't live yet), and cite-and-link-only external tracker URLs (untapped.gg, MTGGoldfish) — we NEVER ingest their numbers, only link to them by name.

rows.coverage_state: sets/rotation live; tiers pending tournament key
sets/legality live; tiers pending tournament key
sets/legality live; tiers pending tournament key
